title: Turkish Peanut Dolma with Intensely Velvety Sauce
description: A fusion of Japanese and Turkish flavors, this dish combines the delicate taste of dolma with the richness of peanut sauce.

ingredients.name: Gochujang
ingredients.notes: Korean chili paste for added depth

instructions: Cook the Turkish Dolma Rice according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the peanuts and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the gochujang and soy sauce, stirring to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the Intensely Velvety Sauce and stir to combine.
Serve the peanut sauce over the cooked Turkish Dolma Rice.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
